description: 浪潮隐喻天然表达递进。木版画质感，平涂无渐变。
base_style_prompt: Ukiyo-e (Japanese woodblock print) style. Washi paper cream (#F5F0E1), indigo blue (#1B4B7A), vermillion (#C53D43), gold (#C4A35A). Wave metaphor: ripples → surge → great wave → breaking wave (maps to 4 steps). Ukiyo-e cartouche labels. Japanese cloud patterns (karakusa) as decoration. Woodblock print quality — flat colors with no gradients. Traditional Japanese aesthetic with narrative progression.
